title: Algerian Tagine Chicken
description: A traditional Algerian dish made with marinated chicken cooked in a flavorful tagine sauce.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the chicken on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set it aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the sliced onion to the pot.
Cook the onion until it is softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the preserved lemon paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Return the chicken to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300°F (150°C) for 30 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the sugar.
Simmer the tagine over medium heat for 10 minutes.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
